verses.1: I will bless the LORD at all times.
verses.2: My soul shall boast in the LORD.
verses.3: Oh magnify the LORD with me.
verses.4: I sought the LORD, and he answered me,
verses.5: They looked to him, and were radiant.
verses.6: This poor man cried, and the LORD heard him,
verses.7: The LORD’s angel encamps around those who fear him,
verses.8: Oh taste and see that the LORD is good.
verses.9: Oh fear the LORD, you his saints,
verses.10: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger,
verses.11: Come, you children, listen to me.
verses.12: Who is someone who desires life,
verses.14: Depart from evil, and do good.
verses.15: The LORD’s eyes are toward the righteous.
verses.16: The LORD’s face is against those who do evil,
verses.17: The righteous cry, and the LORD hears,
verses.18: The LORD is near to those who have a broken heart,
verses.19: Many are the afflictions of the righteous,
verses.20: He protects all of his bones.
verses.22: The LORD redeems the soul of his servants.
